Class NametagService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.scoreboard.services.NametagService
public class NametagService extends Object
Sub-service responsible for nametag team management.

Applies prefix teams to all online player scoreboards so that nametag prefixes are visible server-wide. Delegates scoreboard access to ScoreboardService.getScoreboard(java.util.UUID).

External plugins should call setNametag(String, String, Component) and clearNametagEntry(String). applyToScoreboard(Scoreboard) and clear() are called internally by ScoreboardService.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    applyToScoreboard(org.bukkit.scoreboard.Scoreboard scoreboard)
    Applies all registered nametag teams to a newly created scoreboard.
    static void

    Clears all nametag state.
    static void

    Removes an entry from whichever nametag team it belongs to across all online player scoreboards.
    static void

    Registers or updates a nametag team across all online player scoreboards.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • setNametag

      public static void setNametag(String teamId, String entry, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component prefix)
      Registers or updates a nametag team across all online player scoreboards.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the unique team identifier, e.g. "f_12345"
      entry - the score entry — typically the player's name
      prefix - the prefix Component shown before the player's name

    • clearNametagEntry

      public static void clearNametagEntry(String entry)
      Removes an entry from whichever nametag team it belongs to across all online player scoreboards. Unregisters the team if it becomes empty.
      Parameters:
      entry - the entry to remove — typically the player's name

    • applyToScoreboard

      public static void applyToScoreboard(org.bukkit.scoreboard.Scoreboard scoreboard)
      Applies all registered nametag teams to a newly created scoreboard. Called by ScoreboardService.onJoin(Player) when a player receives their scoreboard.
      Parameters:
      scoreboard - the player's newly created scoreboard

    • clear

      public static void clear()
      Clears all nametag state. Called by ScoreboardService.shutdown().
